description: SendCanary DKIM setup (2 CNAMEs): publishes two DKIM CNAMEs for providers that rotate a selector1 / selector2 pair - most commonly Microsoft 365, which requires both CNAMEs up front even though only one is active at a time. DKIM is required for DMARC alignment and improves deliverability. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: selector1 / target1: first DKIM CNAME (e.g. selector1 -> selector1-<tenant>._domainkey.<tenant>.onmicrosoft.com). selector2 / target2: second DKIM CNAME. Hosts become %selector1%._domainkey.<your-domain> and %selector2%._domainkey.<your-domain>.
